mapper.sql: id, workflow_instance_id, signal_biz_code, signal_time, db_create_time as createTime, db_modify_time as updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_signal_record (workflow_instance_id, signal_biz_code, signal_time, db_create_time) VALUES (#{workflowInstanceId}, #{signalBizCode}, #{signalTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM workflow_signal_record WHERE workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId} AND signal_biz_code = #{signalBizCode}
